creator: frank@harz.behrens.de
text:
I do not agree to commit this version. 
0.9.99.2 is still a development version/release candidate and "unstable".

If someone wants to try this version: the port is available as usual on
http://www.sax.de/~frank/polipo4bsd/
as announced in
http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/message.php?msg_id=38167094

Frank Behrens
port maintainer
